'''thazhoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetognath|chaetognath]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetognath|chaetognath]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thazhoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzheteth|thæzheteth]] || [[word:thæzhetej|thæzhetej]] || [[word:thæzhetesh|thæzhetesh]] || [[word:thæzhete|thæzhete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazhozhototh|thazhozhototh]] || [[word:thazhozhotoj|thazhozhotoj]] || [[word:thazhozhotosh|thazhozhotosh]] || [[word:thazhozhoto|thazhozhoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhototh|thazhototh]] || [[word:thazhotoj|thazhotoj]] || [[word:thazhotosh|thazhotosh]] || [[word:thazhoto|thazhoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhoftoth|thazhoftoth]] || [[word:thazhoftoj|thazhoftoj]] || [[word:thazhoftosh|thazhoftosh]] || [[word:thazhoftof|thazhoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazhototho|thazhototho]] || [[word:thazhotojo|thazhotojo]] || [[word:thazhotosho|thazhotosho]] || [[word:thazhotoko|thazhotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazhototh|thazhototh]] || [[word:thazhotoj|thazhotoj]] || [[word:thazhotosh|thazhotosh]] || [[word:thazhoto|thazhoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazhotothol|thazhotothol]] || [[word:thazhotojol|thazhotojol]] || [[word:thazhotoshol|thazhotoshol]] || [[word:thazhotokol|thazhotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazhotothotho|thazhotothotho]] || [[word:thazhotojojo|thazhotojojo]] || [[word:thazhotoshosho|thazhotoshosho]] || [[word:thazhotoko|thazhotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazhotothon|thazhotothon]] || [[word:thazhotojon|thazhotojon]] || [[word:thazhotoshon|thazhotoshon]] || [[word:thazhotokon|thazhotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazhotothoro|thazhotothoro]] || [[word:thazhotojoro|thazhotojoro]] || [[word:thazhotoshoro|thazhotoshoro]] || [[word:thazhotokoro|thazhotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
